about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Hello World!
about.description1: I'm Jakub, a self-taught web developer with a genuine passion for programming. I have a strong background in both front-end and back-end development, enabling me to create comprehensive and dynamic web applications.
about.description2: Welcome to my personal portfolio, where you can explore my projects and dedication to creating high-quality software solutions.

project1.name: Jules-Art
project1.description: Artist's portfolio website designed to showcase her creative work and provide a means for visitors to get in touch with her.
project1.technologiesDescription: Built with Vue.js, TS, HTML, CSS and Firebase.

project2.name: Blogging Platform
project2.description: Blogging platform where you can view and like all users' posts, create your own account, and manage your own posts.
project2.technologiesDescription: Built with React, Next, JS, HTML, CSS, Firebase and Vercel.

project3.name: Links Page
project3.description: Links page that allows you to create an account, add your links to social media and share them with others. Inspired by Linktree.
project3.technologiesDescription: Built with Svelte, SvelteKit, TS, HTML, CSS, Tailwind, Firebase and Vercel.

project4.name: Habit Tracker
project4.description: Habit Tracker website that allows you to track your habits. You can add, edit and delete your entries.
project4.technologiesDescription: Built with Python, SQlite, JS, HTML and CSS.

project5.name: Meals App
project5.description: Meals app that allows you to add meals to your cart and order them.
project5.technologiesDescription: Built with React, JS, HTML, CSS and Firebase.

project6.name: Weather App
project6.description: Weather app that allows you to check the weather in your city and add it to your favourites.
project6.technologiesDescription: Built with Vue.js, TS, HTML, CSS (Tailwind) and Firebase.

project7.name: Travel Blog
project7.description: Travel blog website. The admin can add posts and images.
project7.technologiesDescription: Built with Vue.js, TS, HTML, CSS and Firebase.

project8.name: TODO App
project8.description: Simple TODO app that allows you to add, edit and delete your tasks.
project8.technologiesDescription: Built with Vue.js, TS, HTML, CSS and Firebase.

project9.name: Coaching Platform
project9.description: Find a coach website that allows you to and register as a coach or find a coach and contact them.
project9.technologiesDescription: Built with Vue.js, JS, HTML, CSS and Firebase.

project10.name: Investment Calculator
project10.description: Investment calculator that allows you to calculate your investment income.
project10.technologiesDescription: Built with React, JS, HTML, CSS and Firebase.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Get in touch
contact.description1: Feel free to reach out to me via the form or social media.
contact.description2: Looking forward to hearing from you!
